org.jfree.chart.plot

Class XYMeasureWithAnnotations

  • java.lang.Object
    • org.jfree.chart.panel.AbstractOverlay
      • org.jfree.chart.panel.CrosshairOverlay
        • org.jfree.chart.plot.XYMeasureWithAnnotations
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    PropertyChangeListener, Serializable, Cloneable, EventListener, ChartMouseListener, Overlay, PublicCloneable

    public class XYMeasureWithAnnotations
extends CrosshairOverlay
implements ChartMouseListener
    Allows the user to measure differences between points in the domain or range of an XYPlot. A user can start a measurement by clicking the mouse according to getMarkPredicate(). A second click of the mouse according to getMarkPredicate() will add an XYMeasurementAnnotation to the plot.
    See Also:
    Serialized Form

      An enumeration that specifies which axis is measured.

      • XYMeasureWithAnnotations

        public XYMeasureWithAnnotations(XYMeasureWithAnnotations.MeasurementAxis axis)
        Creates this measurement overlay and starts listening for user mouse events.
        Parameters:
        axis - the axis to measure.

    • Method Detail

      • addToChartPanel

        public static XYMeasureWithAnnotations addToChartPanel(ChartPanel chartPanel,
                                                       XYMeasureWithAnnotations.MeasurementAxis axis)
        Registers this utility to a chartPanel for a specific axis.
        Parameters:
        chartPanel - the chart panel to register to.
        axis - the axis to measure.
        Returns:
        the created measure utility that was registered to chartPanel

      • addToChartPanel

        public void addToChartPanel(ChartPanel chartPanel)
        Registers this utility to a chartPanel.
        Parameters:
        chartPanel - the chart panel to register to.

        chartPanel - the chart panel to unregister from.

      • getCrosshairPoint

        protected Point2DNumber getCrosshairPoint(ChartMouseEvent event)
        Calculates the point to snap the measurement to, returns null if not applicable.
        Parameters:
        event - contains the current mouse location
        Returns:
        the point to snap the measurement to

      • addAnnotation

        protected void addAnnotation(XYPlot plot,
                             Point2DNumber first,
                             Point2DNumber second,
                             MouseEvent event)
        This method is called when a measurement has been made by the user. This method adds an annotation to the plot.
        Parameters:
        plot - the plot for the annotation
        first - the first measurement point
        second - the second measurement point
        event - the mouse event of the second mouse click.

      • createMeasurementLabel

        protected String createMeasurementLabel(Number firstValue,
                                        Number secondValue,
                                        MouseEvent event)
        Creates a label for a measurement. By default this call is delegated to the label provider.
        Parameters:
        firstValue - the first measurement value
        secondValue - the second measurement value
        event - the mouse event of the second mouse click.
        Returns:
        the label to put use for the measurement annotation, should not be null.

      • createMeasurementAnnotation

        protected XYAnnotation createMeasurementAnnotation(XYMeasurementAnnotation.Orientation orientation,
                                                   String label,
                                                   Point2DNumber first,
                                                   Point2DNumber second)
        Creates an annotation for a measurement. By default an XYMeasurementAnnotation will be created.
        Parameters:
        orientation - orientation to use for the XYMeasurementAnnotation
        label - the annotation text
        first - the first measurement point
        second - the second measurement point
        Returns:
        the created measurement annotation
